data.body:
## Description
Modify `tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py` (or create a new test) to assert that fix-bug SKILL.md Step 5 references `dso:red-test-writer` dispatch and the shared escalation template. Test must FAIL before Step 5 is modified.

Test approach: structural validation — grep fix-bug SKILL.md for 'dso:red-test-writer' and 'red-task-escalation' references. Acceptable per exemption (metadata/schema validation of a skill file).

## File Impact
- MODIFY: tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py (or tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill.sh)

## TDD Requirement
This IS the RED test task. Must fail before GREEN task modifies SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
- [ ] Test file contains assertion for dso:red-test-writer reference
  Verify: grep -q 'red.test.writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py || grep -q 'red.test.writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill.sh
- [ ] Running the test returns non-zero (RED)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill_escalated_section.py -x 2>&1 | grep -q FAILED
